subject: Future Trunks (Dragon Ball Super) in Super Saiyan form — anime IP character, aggressive attack pose
description: A male figure with spiky golden Super Saiyan hair lunges toward the viewer in a powerful attack posture. His left arm is extended forward in a striking position. A vivid golden ki aura surrounds him with crackling lightning effects. The background is a deep blue-black void with electric energy discharges, contrasting sharply with the bright gold of the character's aura. The art style is consistent with the Dragon Ball Super animated series.
foreground: Male humanoid in Super Saiyan form, arm outstretched in strike, golden aura with lightning crackling
background: Deep blue-black void with electric energy discharges and light scatter
